title: GetAX configuration
description: Schema for a repository's committed GetAX config (.getax/settings.json). GetAX scores how ready a repository is for autonomous agents; this file is where a repo argues with that score. Unknown properties are rejected on purpose: a config that says one thing while the score means another is wrong in a way you cannot see.

model.description: The pinned scoring model version, e.g. "v3" or "v4". Pinning means a CLI upgrade never silently moves your score. exclude/posture/archetype require v4.

weights.description: The five signal weights. Must sum to 1.0 (rejected, not rescaled, otherwise). Mutually exclusive with `archetype`.

ignore.description: Globs excluded from probing. A trusted value; for score-affecting exclusions you can prove, prefer `exclude`.

inputs.description: Where this repo's build reports actually are, when they aren't where the conventions guess. Configured paths win over conventions.

overrides.description: Rules this repo declares wrong, with a mandatory reason. The reason is the teaching signal.

reason.description: Why it doesn't apply here. At least 20 characters.

scope.description: An optional path glob narrowing the override.

expires.description: YYYY-MM-DD; the override lapses after this date.

exclude.description: Verified exemption claims (requires model v4). The engine confirms the claim against the files before applying it — an exclusion is earned, not asserted.

path.description: A glob for the files this claim covers.

claim.description: The verifiable claim: generated code, vendored code, or key/value data.

expires.description: YYYY-MM-DD; the exemption lapses after this date.

posture.description: How this repo enforces, when it is not the shape the probes assume (requires model v4). Redirect-and-verify, never suppress.

gate.description: The gate lives in the committed pre-push hook; the scanner verifies it runs the tests.

archetype.description: The kind of repo, which selects a signal-weight profile (requires model v4). Verified against the repo; mutually exclusive with `weights`.

issues.description: How this repo wants findings filed. Inert to the score.

allOf.description: An archetype IS a weight profile, so it cannot be combined with an explicit `weights`.
